
            INSERT INTO dara_mallas_study_plan_line
                (line_order,
                area_homologation_id,
                study_plan_id,
                company_id
            )
            SELECT
                '10' AS line_order,
                ah.id AS area_homologation_id,
                sp.id AS study_plan_id,
                3 AS company_id
            FROM dara_mallas_study_plan sp

            JOIN dara_mallas_program p
                ON p.id = sp.program_id
            AND p.company_id = 3

            JOIN dara_mallas_program_code pc
                ON pc.program_id = p.id
            AND pc.company_id = 3
            AND pc.name = 'ULAT3L602'

            JOIN dara_mallas_area_homologation ah
                ON ah.area_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_area
                    WHERE code = 'L602-B01'
                    AND company_id = 3
                )
            AND ah.period_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_period
                    WHERE name = '000000'
                    AND company_id = 3
                )
            AND ah.company_id = 3

            WHERE sp.period_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_period
                    WHERE name = '000000'
                    AND company_id = 3
            )
            AND sp.company_id = 3

            AND NOT EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM dara_mallas_study_plan_line spl
                WHERE spl.study_plan_id = sp.id
                AND spl.area_homologation_id = ah.id
                AND spl.company_id = 3);
        
            INSERT INTO dara_mallas_study_plan_line

            JOIN dara_mallas_program_code pc
                ON pc.program_id = p.id
            AND pc.company_id = 3
            AND pc.name = 'ULAT4L711'

                ON ah.area_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_area
                    WHERE code = 'L711-A01'
                    AND company_id = 3
                )
            AND ah.period_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_period
                    WHERE name = '000000'
                    AND company_id = 3
                )
            AND ah.company_id = 3

            WHERE sp.period_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_period
                    WHERE name = '000000'
                    AND company_id = 3
            )
            AND sp.company_id = 3

                SELECT 1
                FROM dara_mallas_study_plan_line spl
                WHERE spl.study_plan_id = sp.id
                AND spl.area_homologation_id = ah.id
                AND spl.company_id = 3);

                study_plan_id,
                company_id
            )
            SELECT
                '10' AS line_order,
                ah.id AS area_homologation_id,
                sp.id AS study_plan_id,
                3 AS company_id
            FROM dara_mallas_study_plan sp

            JOIN dara_mallas_program p
                ON p.id = sp.program_id
            AND p.company_id = 3

            JOIN dara_mallas_program_code pc
                ON pc.program_id = p.id
            AND pc.company_id = 3
            AND pc.name = 'ULAT3P651'

            JOIN dara_mallas_area_homologation ah
                ON ah.area_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_area
                    WHERE code = '651-B01'
                    AND company_id = 3
                )
            AND ah.period_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_period
                    WHERE name = '000000'
                    AND company_id = 3
                )
            AND ah.company_id = 3

            WHERE sp.period_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_period
                    WHERE name = '000000'
                    AND company_id = 3
            )
            AND sp.company_id = 3

            AND NOT EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM dara_mallas_study_plan_line spl
                WHERE spl.study_plan_id = sp.id
                AND spl.area_homologation_id = ah.id
                AND spl.company_id = 3);

            AND p.company_id = 3

            AND pc.company_id = 3
            AND pc.name = 'ULAT1P019'

                study_plan_id,
                company_id
            )
            SELECT
                '60' AS line_order,
                ah.id AS area_homologation_id,
                sp.id AS study_plan_id,
                3 AS company_id
            FROM dara_mallas_study_plan sp

            JOIN dara_mallas_program p
                ON p.id = sp.program_id
            AND p.company_id = 3

            JOIN dara_mallas_program_code pc
                ON pc.program_id = p.id
            AND pc.company_id = 3
            AND pc.name = 'ULAT1P025'

            JOIN dara_mallas_area_homologation ah
                ON ah.area_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_area
                    WHERE code = '025-C06'
                    AND company_id = 3
                )
            AND ah.period_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_period
                    WHERE name = '000000'
                    AND company_id = 3
                )
            AND ah.company_id = 3

            WHERE sp.period_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_period
                    WHERE name = '000000'
                    AND company_id = 3
            )
            AND sp.company_id = 3

            AND NOT EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM dara_mallas_study_plan_line spl
                WHERE spl.study_plan_id = sp.id
                AND spl.area_homologation_id = ah.id
                AND spl.company_id = 3);

            AND p.company_id = 3

                ON pc.program_id = p.id

                area_homologation_id,
                study_plan_id,
                company_id
            )
            SELECT
                '10' AS line_order,
                ah.id AS area_homologation_id,
                sp.id AS study_plan_id,
                3 AS company_id
            FROM dara_mallas_study_plan sp

            JOIN dara_mallas_program p
                ON p.id = sp.program_id
            AND p.company_id = 3

            JOIN dara_mallas_program_code pc
                ON pc.program_id = p.id
            AND pc.company_id = 3
            AND pc.name = 'ULAT2L854'

            JOIN dara_mallas_area_homologation ah
                ON ah.area_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_area
                    WHERE code = 'L854-B01'
                    AND company_id = 3
                )
            AND ah.period_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_period
                    WHERE name = '000000'
                    AND company_id = 3
                )
            AND ah.company_id = 3

            WHERE sp.period_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_period
                    WHERE name = '000000'
                    AND company_id = 3
            )
            AND sp.company_id = 3

                SELECT 1
                FROM dara_mallas_study_plan_line spl

                AND spl.area_homologation_id = ah.id

            FROM dara_mallas_study_plan sp

                ON p.id = sp.program_id
            AND p.company_id = 3

            AND pc.company_id = 3
            AND pc.name = 'ULAT2L864'

                ah.id AS area_homologation_id,
                sp.id AS study_plan_id,
                3 AS company_id
            FROM dara_mallas_study_plan sp

            JOIN dara_mallas_program p
                ON p.id = sp.program_id
            AND p.company_id = 3

            JOIN dara_mallas_program_code pc
                ON pc.program_id = p.id
            AND pc.company_id = 3
            AND pc.name = 'ULAT1P214'

            JOIN dara_mallas_area_homologation ah
                ON ah.area_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_area
                    WHERE code = '214-C08'
                    AND company_id = 3
                )
            AND ah.period_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_period
                    WHERE name = '000000'
                    AND company_id = 3
                )
            AND ah.company_id = 3

            WHERE sp.period_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_period
                    WHERE name = '000000'
                    AND company_id = 3
            )
            AND sp.company_id = 3

            AND NOT EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM dara_mallas_study_plan_line spl
                WHERE spl.study_plan_id = sp.id
                AND spl.area_homologation_id = ah.id
                AND spl.company_id = 3);

            AND pc.company_id = 3
            AND pc.name = 'ULAT1P219'

                area_homologation_id,
                study_plan_id,
                company_id
            )
            SELECT
                '20' AS line_order,
                ah.id AS area_homologation_id,
                sp.id AS study_plan_id,
                3 AS company_id
            FROM dara_mallas_study_plan sp

            JOIN dara_mallas_program p
                ON p.id = sp.program_id
            AND p.company_id = 3

            JOIN dara_mallas_program_code pc
                ON pc.program_id = p.id
            AND pc.company_id = 3
            AND pc.name = 'ULAT1P230'

            JOIN dara_mallas_area_homologation ah
                ON ah.area_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_area
                    WHERE code = '230-C02'
                    AND company_id = 3
                )
            AND ah.period_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_period
                    WHERE name = '000000'
                    AND company_id = 3
                )
            AND ah.company_id = 3

            WHERE sp.period_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_period
                    WHERE name = '000000'
                    AND company_id = 3
            )
            AND sp.company_id = 3

            AND NOT EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM dara_mallas_study_plan_line spl
                WHERE spl.study_plan_id = sp.id
                AND spl.area_homologation_id = ah.id
                AND spl.company_id = 3);

            JOIN dara_mallas_program_code pc
                ON pc.program_id = p.id
            AND pc.company_id = 3
            AND pc.name = 'ULAT2P504'

                )

                area_homologation_id,
                study_plan_id,
                company_id
            )
            SELECT
                '20' AS line_order,
                ah.id AS area_homologation_id,
                sp.id AS study_plan_id,
                3 AS company_id
            FROM dara_mallas_study_plan sp

            JOIN dara_mallas_program p
                ON p.id = sp.program_id
            AND p.company_id = 3

            JOIN dara_mallas_program_code pc
                ON pc.program_id = p.id
            AND pc.company_id = 3
            AND pc.name = 'ULAT1P222'

            JOIN dara_mallas_area_homologation ah
                ON ah.area_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_area
                    WHERE code = '222-C02'
                    AND company_id = 3
                )
            AND ah.period_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_period
                    WHERE name = '000000'
                    AND company_id = 3
                )
            AND ah.company_id = 3

            WHERE sp.period_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_period
                    WHERE name = '000000'
                    AND company_id = 3
            )
            AND sp.company_id = 3

            AND NOT EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM dara_mallas_study_plan_line spl
                WHERE spl.study_plan_id = sp.id
                AND spl.area_homologation_id = ah.id
                AND spl.company_id = 3);

                ON p.id = sp.program_id
            AND p.company_id = 3

            JOIN dara_mallas_program_code pc
                ON pc.program_id = p.id
            AND pc.company_id = 3
            AND pc.name = 'ULAT1P244'

                ON ah.area_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_area
                    WHERE code = '244-C11'
                    AND company_id = 3
                )
            AND ah.period_id = (
                    SELECT id

                    AND company_id = 3

                    WHERE name = '201301'
                    AND company_id = 3
            )
            AND sp.company_id = 3

                AND spl.area_homologation_id = ah.id

            FROM dara_mallas_study_plan sp

                ON p.id = sp.program_id
            AND p.company_id = 3

                ON pc.program_id = p.id
            AND pc.company_id = 3
            AND pc.name = 'ULAT2A986'

                    FROM dara_mallas_area
                    WHERE code = 'A463-T04'
                    AND company_id = 3
                )

                    FROM dara_mallas_period
                    WHERE name = '000000'
                    AND company_id = 3
            )
            AND sp.company_id = 3

                FROM dara_mallas_study_plan_line spl
                WHERE spl.study_plan_id = sp.id
                AND spl.area_homologation_id = ah.id
                AND spl.company_id = 3);
        
            INSERT INTO dara_mallas_study_plan_line
                (line_order,
                area_homologation_id,
                study_plan_id,
                company_id
            )
            SELECT
                '40' AS line_order,
                ah.id AS area_homologation_id,
                sp.id AS study_plan_id,
                3 AS company_id
            FROM dara_mallas_study_plan sp

            JOIN dara_mallas_program p
                ON p.id = sp.program_id
            AND p.company_id = 3

            JOIN dara_mallas_program_code pc
                ON pc.program_id = p.id
            AND pc.company_id = 3
            AND pc.name = 'ULAT2A988'

            JOIN dara_mallas_area_homologation ah
                ON ah.area_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_area
                    WHERE code = 'A988-B04'
                    AND company_id = 3
                )
            AND ah.period_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_period
                    WHERE name = '000000'
                    AND company_id = 3
                )
            AND ah.company_id = 3

            WHERE sp.period_id = (
                    SELECT id
                    FROM dara_mallas_period
                    WHERE name = '000000'
                    AND company_id = 3
            )
            AND sp.company_id = 3

                SELECT 1
                FROM dara_mallas_study_plan_line spl
                WHERE spl.study_plan_id = sp.id
                AND spl.area_homologation_id = ah.id
                AND spl.company_id = 3);
